question_text: A red apple appears red because it:

options.label: A
options.text: Reflects red light and absorbs other colours

options.label: B
options.text: Absorbs red light and reflects other colours

options.label: D
options.text: Refracts red light through its surface

explanation: Objects appear to be a certain colour because they reflect that colour of light towards our eyes and absorb all the other colours. A red apple reflects red light but absorbs green and blue light, which is why we see it as red.
